description: A full-service Enterprise AI consultancy delivering customized intelligence solutions worldwide.

origins.heading: Our Origins
origins.title: Research-Grade Intelligence. Enterprise-Ready Scale.
paragraphs: CittaAI was founded in 2022 by a team of researchers and engineers who saw a fundamental disconnect: the technology for AI existed, but the bridge to enterprise value was broken.

We set out to build that bridge. Not just another AI tool, but a comprehensive operating system that understands the nuance, security, and scale required by the world's largest organizations. Today, we process billions of data points for the Fortune 500.

our_dna.heading: Our DNA
our_dna.title: The Principles That Drive Us
our_dna.description: We believe in engineering excellence, radical transparency, and the transformative power of intelligence.

principles.title: Innovation First
principles.description: We don't just use AI; we advance the state of the art.

principles.title: Client Partnership
principles.description: Your wins are our wins. We build for long-term value.

principles.title: Ethical AI
principles.description: Transparency and safety are baked into every model.

principles.title: Speed & Excellence
principles.description: Rapid iteration without compromising engineering rigor.

members.name: Vinay Velivela
members.description: Visionary leader driving innovation and growth.
